title: Indians & Shopping | Take A Break
description: From bargaining battles to asking “Bhaiya, last price?” — this sketch captures the classic Indian shopping experience in the most funny and relatable way! Whether it’s mall shopping, street shopping, or that one friend who compares every price online, we’ve shown the quirks we all secretly do.

title: Indians and TV 📺 | Take A Break
description: TV ke bina life adhoori lagti hai — especially in Indian households! 📺

title: Indians and Neighbours | Types of Padosi | Take A Break
description: Neighbors – can’t live with them, can’t live without them! In this comedy sketch, we bring to life the different types of neighbours we all have in our societies — from the gossip aunty 👩‍🦳, the always-complaining uncle 😤, the overly helpful types 🤗, to the ones who know everything happening in your house before you do! 👀

title: Types of Podcasters🎙️ | Podcasters ka Mela | Take A Break
description: From motivational gurus to controversial hot-takers, Varjun visits every podcaster in town, only to find himself in the middle of chaotic interviews, bizarre questions, and awkward moments. In this hilarious parody, we’ve spoofed famous podcasters and Arjun Kapoor himself — with a twist you won’t see coming!

title: Bappa's arrival | Ganesh Chaturthi Special | Take a break
Every Parent Teacher Meeting 🧑🏻‍🏫 | Take A Break
description: Welcome to Every Parent Teacher Meeting — where teachers give feedback, and parents bring the real drama! 🧑‍🏫👨‍👩‍👦💥

title: Sheela Didi Aur Cycle Ki Chori 🕵️‍♀️🚲 | Detective Sheela - Case No. 2 | Take A Break
description: Armed with her unstoppable attitude and a million questions, Sheela Didi interrogates everyone — from the sleepy watchmen and shady bachelors to the clueless couple Prashant and Sayali. As she digs deeper, the investigation turns into a rollercoaster of hilarious accusations, wild theories, and non-stop laughter!

title: Gen-Z Influencers as Parents | Take A Break
description: What happens when Gen-Z influencers become parents? Pure chaos, reels, and hashtags! 🎥💥

title: School Ka Sports Day | Take A Break
description: Ah, School Ka Sports Day—the one day when even the laziest kids suddenly become athletes (at least in spirit)! 😜

title: Best School in the World | School Aaj Kal | Take A Break
description: What would schools say if they dropped the facade and got real? Welcome to School Aaj Kal, a hilarious yet thought-provoking comedy sketch that imagines just that! 🎓💸

title: Maa Munna Aur Property Kaa Batwara | Stable Money | Take A Break
description: Prepare for a comedy of epic proportions in our latest sketch, "Maa, Munna Aur Property Ka Batwara"! 🏠😂
